title: PKD Signed Letters (Copies)
author: Philip K. Dick
card_summary: Copies of signed letters by Philip K. Dick. These are reproductions of original signed correspondence, likely containing a small number of individual letters with high-quality reproductions of the originals.
page_summary:
A 13-page scanned document containing copies of signed letters by Philip K. Dick. No OCR text layer is present. The filename indicates these are reproductions or photocopies of original signed correspondence rather than the originals themselves.

At 13 pages, this document likely contains multiple letters, making it a significant collection of Dick's personal correspondence. Signed letters by Dick are valuable both as primary biographical and intellectual sources and as collectible artifacts in the rare book and manuscript market. The preservation of copies ensures that the content of these letters is available for scholarship even if the originals are dispersed among private collectors or institutional archives.
